mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into t_user_role
user_id,
role_id,
comp_id,
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_user_role
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comp_id = #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_user_role
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
comp_id = #{compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select count(1) from t_user_role
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
comp_id = #{compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from t_user_role
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
role_id = #{model.roleId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
comp_id = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_user_role
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
role_id = #{model.roleId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
comp_id = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
SELECT t3.`role_name` FROM t_user_role t1 JOIN t_user t2 ON t1.`user_id` = t2.`user_id` JOIN t_role t3 ON t1.`role_id` = t3.`role_id` WHERE t2.`user_name` = #{username}

SELECT t5.`permission_name` FROM t_user_role t1 JOIN t_user t2 ON t1.`user_id` = t2.`user_id` JOIN t_role t3 ON t1.`role_id` = t3.`role_id` JOIN t_role_permission t4 ON t3.`role_id` = t4.`role_id` JOIN t_permission t5 ON t4.`permission_id` = t5.`permission_id` WHERE t2.`user_name` = #{username}

SELECT t5.`permission_name` FROM t_user_role t1 JOIN t_user t2 ON t1.`user_id` = t2.`user_id` JOIN t_role t3 ON t1.`role_id` = t3.`role_id` JOIN t_role_permission t4 ON t3.`role_id` = t4.`role_id` JOIN t_permission t5 ON t4.`permission_id` = t5.`permission_id` WHERE t2.`user_name` = #{username}
and t1.comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_user_role where id in
#{item,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(role_id) AS roleIds FROM t_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId};
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(role_id) AS roleIds FROM t_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} and comp_id = #{compId};
mapper.delete:
delete from t_user_role where
(user_id = #{item.userId} and role_id = #{item.roleId} and comp_id = #{item.compId})
